case_title: RICK PATEL VS. CARIDAD GONZALES et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT GONZALES, CARIDAD HEARING SET FOR JAN-11-2012 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALES, CARIDAD

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PATEL, RICK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GONZALES, CARIDAD THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 706 POLK STREET #36, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA 94109, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $28.49 FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, RICK
ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALES, CARIDAD
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, RICK SERVED OCT-28-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALES, CARIDAD
RENT DEPOSIT, TRAN # W2011C13R018, TAG # 029757 DEPOSITED BY DEFENDANT GONZALES, CARIDAD

MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON JAN-11-2012 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT CARIDAD GONZALES' WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, RICK AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALES, CARIDAD DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALES, CARIDAD
ORDER OF THE COURT FOR STAY OF EXECUTION STAY DATE IS DEC 20, 2011
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR STAY OF EXECUTION FILED BY DEFENDANT GONZALES, CARIDAD
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALES, CARIDAD
